Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 127 upvotes, 11 comments
  2. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 73 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 31 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 370 upvotes, 66 comments
  5. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 834 upvotes, 169 comments
  6. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 117 upvotes, 19 comments
  7. Iguanaworks has closed down. USB Infrared hardware open source maker 33 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 59 upvotes, 8 comments
  9. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 60 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 352 upvotes, 109 comments
  11. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 28 upvotes, 4 comments
  12. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 61 upvotes, 14 comments
  13. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 239 upvotes, 77 comments
  14. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 184 upvotes, 57 comments
  15. Someone at BrowserStack Is Leaking Users' Email Address 115 upvotes, 33 comments
  16. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 26 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. Demonstrating Real Time AV2 Decoding on Consumer Laptops 46 upvotes, 10 comments
  18. Common drug tests lead to tens of thousands wrongful arrests a year 32 upvotes, 6 comments
  19. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  20. Sad Story of My Google Workspace Account Suspension 114 upvotes, 42 comments
  21. Shared mutable state in Rust (2022) 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  22. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 717 upvotes, 338 comments
  23. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 43 upvotes, 13 comments
  24. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 158 upvotes, 77 comments
  25. Talk like caveman 233 upvotes, 162 comments
  26. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 371 upvotes, 274 comments
  27. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 412 upvotes, 366 comments
  28. Puzzlehunts 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Ubuntu now requires more RAM than Windows 11 106 upvotes, 113 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 10:30pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
